Senior Data Engineer

We are looking for an experienced engineer who can design, build, and operate reliable data pipelines for product analytics, finance reporting, and machine learning features. You will work with analysts and backend teams to model domain events, enforce data quality, and document transformations. The role includes ownership of batch and streaming workloads, schema evolution, and observability dashboards with clear on-call practices. You should be comfortable with Python, SQL, and cloud-native tools for orchestration. Daily responsibilities include code reviews, incident response, backlog refinement, and mentoring teammates. Requirements include production experience with distributed systems, message brokers, data warehouses, and CI/CD pipelines. We offer hybrid collaboration, direct impact, and long-term product ownership in an international team.
